name: Bhavik Joshi
title: Software Developer
tagline: Building thoughtful software, one idea at a time.
bio: Bhavik Joshi is a Software Developer and Computer Science student at Chhavi Devi Group of Institutions. He enjoys turning ideas into clean, dependable software and learning by building real things end to end.
knowledgeSummary: Comfortable across the modern web stack — TypeScript, React, and Next.js on the front end, with Node.js services and SQL/NoSQL data stores on the back end, plus a growing interest in real-time 3D in the browser.
workSummary: Builds web applications and developer tools end to end, favouring clear architecture, readable code, and content that is easy to change without rewriting the system.
thinkingApproach: Starts from the problem the software needs to solve, breaks it into small replaceable parts, and validates ideas early with simple, testable slices before scaling them up.
futureDirection: Growing into a well-rounded software engineer — going deeper on systems design and AI-assisted tooling while shipping projects that people actually use.
collaborationValue: Reliable and easy to work with: communicates clearly, keeps things simple enough to hand off, and cares about leaving documentation a teammate can actually follow.
